mission.title: open-policy-agent-opa-: Configurable command flags through environment variables
mission.description: Configurable command flags through environment variables. Requested by 6+ users.

steps.title: Check current open-policy-agent-opa- deployment
steps.description:
Verify your open-policy-agent-opa- version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-
helm list -n open-policy-agent-opa- 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working open-policy-agent-opa- installation.

steps.title: Review open-policy-agent-opa- configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant open-policy-agent-opa- configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-
kubectl get configmap -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-policy-agent-opa-
```
## What part of OPA would you like to see improved?

I would like to avoid having to overwrite the container command line to customize  the execution for an environment.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Configurable command flags through environment variables
steps.description:
As requested in issue 4277, this branch adds environment variable backups to command flags found in the cmd package.

### Why the changes in this PR are needed?

As documented in #4277 there are certain situations where explicit command flag values don't make the most sense, and it instead makes more sense to set environment variables that set command flag values as a backup, if the flags themselves aren't explicitly set.

### What are the changes in this PR?

For each command flag in the `cmd`

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-
kubectl get events -n open-policy-agent-opa- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Configurable command flags through environment variables" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: As requested in issue 4277, this branch adds environment variable backups to command flags found in the cmd package.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with open-policy-agent-opa- installed or the issue environment reproducible.
